SEARCH

Uses of Class
com.cellsimulation.model.Grid

Packages that use Grid
Package
Description
com.cellsimulation.app
Application entry point and JavaFX user interface layer.
com.cellsimulation.model
Core simulation model: persons, grid, engine, and shared types.
com.cellsimulation.neighborhood
Strategy implementations for cell neighborhood computation.
com.cellsimulation.stats
Live statistics collection and history.

    Methods in com.cellsimulation.app with parameters of type Grid
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    MainController.onTick(Grid grid, int tickCount)
    Listener callback invoked by the engine after each tick.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Grid
    SimulationEngine.getGrid()
     
    Methods in com.cellsimulation.model with parameters of type Grid
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    Person.move(Grid grid, NeighborhoodStrategy neighborhood, SimulationSettings settings)
    Optionally relocates this person to a random free neighboring cell.
    void
    Person.spread(Grid grid, NeighborhoodStrategy neighborhood, SimulationSettings settings)
    Spreads the disease to susceptible neighbors using a case-contact model.
    Constructors in com.cellsimulation.model with parameters of type Grid
    Modifier
    Constructor
    Description
     
    SimulationEngine(Grid grid, SimulationSettings settings, NeighborhoodStrategy neighborhood)
    Creates a new simulation engine wired to the given grid, settings and neighborhood strategy.

  • Uses of Grid in com.cellsimulation.neighborhood

    Methods in com.cellsimulation.neighborhood with parameters of type Grid
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    List<Position>
    EuclideanNeighborhood.getNeighbors(Grid grid, Position position)
    Returns the neighbors of the given position lying within the Euclidean radius.
    List<Position>
    ManhattanNeighborhood.getNeighbors(Grid grid, Position position)
    Returns the neighbors of the given position lying within the Manhattan distance.
    List<Position>
    MooreNeighborhood.getNeighbors(Grid grid, Position position)
    Returns the eight Moore neighbors of the given position.
    List<Position>
    NeighborhoodStrategy.getNeighbors(Grid grid, Position position)
    Returns the positions of the neighbors of the given position on the provided grid, according to this strategy.
    List<Position>
    OrthogonalNeighborhood.getNeighbors(Grid grid, Position position)
    Returns the four orthogonal neighbors of the given position.

    Methods in com.cellsimulation.stats with parameters of type Grid
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    SimulationListener.onTick(Grid grid, int tickCount)
    Invoked by the simulation engine after each tick has been computed.
    void
    StatisticsService.onTick(Grid grid, int tickCount)
    Records a fresh snapshot of the grid for the given tick.
    Constructors in com.cellsimulation.stats with parameters of type Grid
    Modifier
    Constructor
    Description
     
    Statistics(Grid grid, int tick)
    Builds a snapshot of the given grid at the given tick.
